masterMeter.note: auto = engineering/spec/content lane progress; human = sales/hiring/panel/M&A lane; total weights both. autoCeiling is the structural cap of pure auto-mode per Constitution Article IX. AUTO-MODE LANE 33/33 ENGINEERING-COMPLETE: ALL Wave-2 + Wave-1 content at 100/100 (1300 questions); SAML/SCIM library (37 tests); Stack-Vault tenant-isolated with double watermark (22 tests); JD-Forge alpha library (40 tests); Observability IaC + OTel SDK init (4 tests); PITR IaC + DR runbook. Cred-bound items are annotated engineering-complete-{cred|translation}-bound, never claimed as released.

runs.summary: 🟢 SES domain identity for qorium.online — DNS published, awaiting AWS auto-verification. CEO recovered AWS root credentials, completed MFA registration (Passkey), region ap-south-1 (Mumbai), account 049666818793. Created SES domain identity with Easy DKIM RSA_2048; MAIL FROM intentionally not started. Claude-for-Chrome captured 3 DKIM CNAME tokens (roesn32foh2j4gxmd3t366nse3k6tflr, pw64uji46tmduen24oltmbar5revwujt, dtdfvqj7mzv2b33hbkmtqvqpnxneq7us) + pasted into Cloudflare DNS as DNS-only (gray cloud). Added SPF TXT (v=spf1 include:amazonses.com ~all at root) and DMARC TXT (v=DMARC1; p=none; rua=mailto:postmaster@qorium.online; pct=100 at _dmarc). Server-side verification via socket DNS query against 1.1.1.1: ALL 5 records resolve correctly — 3 DKIM CNAMEs to *.dkim.amazonses.com, SPF TXT live, DMARC TXT live. AWS SES Identity status currently 'Verification pending'; will auto-flip to 'Verified' within 5-30 min as AWS polls DNS. Pre-existing api/qorium.online A + www CNAME untouched (still proxied). Sandbox mode active (production-access request is separate human-bound step). Master meter HOLDS at 0.78 — SES is engineering-complete-cred-bound moving to fully complete once AWS confirms verification. Item §1 of CEO Decision Packet (cred-drop) substantially closed for SES; Observability + PITR cred-drops remain pending.

🟢 DNS migration complete: qorium.online moved from Hostinger parking nameservers (atlas/hyperion.dns-parking.com) to Cloudflare (bailey.ns.cloudflare.com + bruce.ns.cloudflare.com). 11th domain on Bhaskar@talpro.in's existing Cloudflare account; Free plan. Existing DNS records imported (A api/qorium.online → 147.93.103.194, CNAME www, all proxied). Verified server-side via socket DNS query against both 8.8.8.8 and 1.1.1.1 — both report new Cloudflare NS records. Cloudflare dashboard catches up to 'Active' within 10-30 min typically. Executed via Claude-for-Chrome browser automation (CEO pasted orchestration prompt; agent confirmed each step via screenshot). Other 10 Cloudflare domains untouched; no paid Cloudflare features enabled; no DNSSEC changes. NEXT-SESSION FOLLOWUP: (1) optional CEO double-check Hostinger nameserver save persisted (Claude-Chrome reported Save was implicit via form_input but user can verify); (2) AWS SES setup → 5 DKIM/SPF/DMARC records to paste into Cloudflare DNS panel (Phase 5 of plan); (3) MX records for inbound @qorium.online email if needed later. Master meter HOLDS at 0.78 — DNS infrastructure unblocked but not yet sending email.

Decision: AGREE plain — full ₹65L Year 1 budget envelope authorized, no conditions. Ratification record: PR #27 comment thread + governance/Constitutional-Amendment-v2.1-Article-IX-M9-Psychometric.md updated to ✅ RATIFIED status. Constitution v2.1 supersedes v2.0; v2.0 preserved as historical record. Board notification scheduled for next quarterly review. Human-lane: 4/14 → 5/14. Wave-3 authoring legally unblocked — actual spend gated on SME Lead hire (item §3) + I/O Psych contractor sign (item §2) per CEO Decision Packet sequencing §7. Sprint 3.5 alpha: JD-Forge SKU 2 library. New @qorium/jd-forge package: types.ts (ParsedJobDescription, GenerationSpec, DraftQuestion, QuestionFormat union of v0.6 formats), parsing/jd-parser.ts (validateParsed exhaustive shape check + retry-once wrapper around injectable LlmExtractor), role-graph/mapper.ts (8-prefix starter catalog covering exactly the Wave-1 100/100 sub-skills: java/python/react/sqldata/devops/sf/aws/aipe; matchSingleSkill pattern matching + mapRoleToSubSkills aggregating with weight + coverage report + unmatched-skills surfacing for SME catalog extension), generation/spec-builder.ts (largest-remainder distribution + 40/30/20/10 format mix per spec §3.3 + role-family-aware design-vs-SJT routing + 4-band difficulty IRT b targets + per-question round-robin assignment; guards on total range), output/exporters.ts (canonical JSON envelope, RFC-4180 CSV with quote+comma+newline escaping, HackerRank-v1 mapped JSON preserving QOrium watermark in metadata; exhaustive switch-never on format). 40 unit tests pass. Live LLM call (services/jd-forge Express + ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) is cred-bound; defers to cred-drop. Workspace: 8 packages + 2 services typecheck clean.

Sprint 3.4: Stack-Vault tenant isolation + double watermark. Migration 0009_stack_vault.sql adds app.tenant_stack_vaults (per-tenant tier/floor/expiry/encrypted-pepper) and content.questions.stack_vault_tenant_id with sparse partial UNIQUE INDEX (stack_vault_tenant_id, qor_id) so the same qor_id is independent across tenants. New services/readybank/src/middleware/tenant-isolation.ts: requireActiveVault layered on @qorium/auth AuthContext — returns 401 unauth, 403 on SO-10 export:stack-vault scope (forbidden per Constitution + D3), 404 on no/lapsed/expired vault (no existence leak), 503 on missing pepper, attaches VaultContext on success. New services/readybank/src/stack-vault/watermark.ts: computeDoubleWatermark (HMAC-SHA256 over baseSeed||tenantId||renderId; per-vault pepper), applyVisibleFooter (idempotent), applyHomoglyphStego (Latin→Cyrillic homoglyph mask driven by signature bits). New services/readybank/src/repositories/stack-vault.ts: every SELECT/INSERT joins on tenant_id (defense in depth). New services/readybank/src/routes/stack-vault.ts: GET list / GET one (renders with double watermark) / POST create with 23505 → 409 mapping. 22 new unit tests pass: 14 watermark (determinism, cross-tenant unforgeable, pepper rotation, render-event uniqueness, footer format, homoglyph determinism) + 8 middleware (401/403/404/503/success). Workspace: 138 active tests, 0 failures, 21 DB-integration tests skipped per existing pattern.

Sprint 4.3 reconcile: Auto-lane tile audit. Promoted 6 tiles in_progress→complete with evidence (sprint-1.7.nos-mapper, sprint-1.8.irt, sprint-1.8.panel-api, sprint-1.8.anti-leak, sprint-1.8.admin, phase-2.inr-gst). Promoted 2 tiles in_progress→engineering-complete-{cred|translation}-bound (sprint-1.7.email-iac, phase-2.i18n) — engineering predicate met; deployment / translation human-bound. Auto lane: 25/33 → 31/33 (94%). Remaining 2: phase-3.jd-forge + phase-3.stack-vault + phase-4.observability + phase-4.pitr (next sprints). Master meter holds at 0.78 ceiling per Constitution Article IX.

Sprint 3.3 alpha: SAML/SSO implementation. Migration 0008_sso_jit_provisioning.sql adds app.tenant_sso_config (per-tenant SAML/OIDC + SCIM config), app.saml_assertions_seen (replay-attack guard with HMAC-pepper-bound IDs), app.scim_external_id_map (idempotent SCIM CRUD), app.sp_signing_certs (rotation overlap), and recruiters.auth_source column. New @qorium/saml package: types.ts, validate.ts (assertion validator with issuer/audience/recipient/clock-skew/replay/InResponseTo checks), jit.ts (create/claim/login/reject decision tree), scim-token.ts (HMAC-SHA256 pepper hash + rotation overlap), replay-guard.ts. 37 unit tests passing across 4 files. Live IdP integration tests halt on cred-drop per spec §9. 277 active workspace tests (was 240).

schemaInvariants.autoEligibilityRule: A tile is auto_eligible iff its evidence-of-done is a commit on main. Sales/hiring/panel/IP/M&A tiles are NEVER auto_eligible.
stopConditions: Outbound message to humans outside bot perimeter
Production credential operation without prior cred-drop
